---
title: "Talks"
description: "Selected conference presentations by Shixiong Hu."
---

::: {.eyebrow}
Presentations
:::

# Conference activity and community links.

::: {.timeline}
::: {.timeline-item}
**2026**

### [Assessing Short-Term Climate Change Across the Cretaceous-Paleogene Boundary with an Earth System Model](https://naturalhistory.si.edu/research/paleobiology/news-and-highlights/cbep-2026)

Oral presentation at Climatic and Biotic Events of the Paleogene 2026.

*Washington, DC, USA*
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**2025**

### NSF-NCAR CESM Paleoclimate Working Group Meeting

Oral presentation on global soot deposition constraints for transient soot injection simulations.

*Boulder, CO, USA*
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**2025**

### GSA Fall Meeting

Oral presentation on soot-emission origins associated with the Chicxulub impact.

*San Antonio, TX, USA*
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**2024**

### AGU Fall Meeting

Oral presentation on simulating the effects of emissions from meteor impacts.

*Washington, DC, USA*
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**2023**

### AGU Fall Meeting

Poster on organic coating effects on soot emissions at the K-Pg mass extinction event.

*San Francisco, CA, USA*
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**2022**

### AGU Fall Meeting

Poster on soot-emission uncertainty after an asteroid impact at the K-Pg boundary.

*Chicago, IL, USA*
:::
:::
